mapper.sql: comm_cl_cd, comm_cd, comm_cd_nm, dflt_yn, up_comm_cd, chartr_ref1, chartr_ref2, chartr_ref3, chartr_ref4, chartr_ref5, num_ref1, num_ref2, num_ref3, num_ref4, num_ref5
mapper.select: SELECT cm.comm_cl_cd , cm.comm_cd , cm.comm_cd_nm , cm.dflt_yn , cm.up_comm_cd , cm.chartr_ref1 , cm.chartr_ref2 , cm.chartr_ref3 , cm.chartr_ref4 , cm.chartr_ref5 , cm.num_ref1 , cm.num_ref2 , cm.num_ref3 , cm.num_ref4 , cm.num_ref5 FROM fscps.cm_cl_code_m_if cl INNER JOIN fscps.cm_code_m_if cm ON cl.comm_cl_cd = cm.comm_cl_cd WHERE cl.use_yn = 'Y' AND cm.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY cm.comm_cl_cd, COALESCE(cm.lnup_ord::integer, 0), cm.comm_cd
